meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.position: Frontend-Focused Full Stack Developer | React | Node.js | MongoDB
meta.heroAbout: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer specialized in building highly interactive interfaces, database integrations, and serverless workflows.
meta.about: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of professional experience building modern user interfaces and SaaS platforms. Proficient in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, combined with hands-on experience structuring backend workflows using Node.js, Express, Supabase, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. Skilled in linking client-side applications with secure database schemas, building serverless endpoints, and managing real-time data flows.

achievements.title: Frontend & Full Stack Dev
achievements.description: Led UI development and successfully integrated database/serverless features for multiple production-grade web applications using Supabase and MongoDB.

achievements.title: API & DB Integrations
achievements.description: Connected 30+ REST APIs, managed database models, and set up dynamic authentication workflows with role-based features.

achievements.title: Production Scale Dev
achievements.description: Contributed to 17+ commercial and SaaS products, translating design visual concepts into functional full-stack flows.

impact: Acted as lead UI engineer and contributor to backend integrations across 17+ SaaS, LMS, and administrative applications.
Designed and connected React frontends with dynamic server systems, boosting features for LMS, e-commerce, and dashboard apps.
Engineered robust React forms, global state flows, and query caching for high-load web dashboards.
leadership: Independently owned the entire UI layout and backend integration modules for a React-based commercial LMS product.
Partnered with database and service teams to implement end-to-end features, resolving API structure and state caching challenges.

projects.name: Marifa LMS
projects.description: Engineered the full frontend system, wiring complex courses, live class feeds, user profiles, and assessment systems to backend REST APIs.

projects.name: Aorabooks
projects.description: Enhanced business workflow systems, including custom dashboard charts, accounting pipelines, and invoice generations.

responsibilities: Designed full stack integrations linking client UIs with RESTful server backends.
Wired React Context, React Query, and database endpoints to build responsive single-page platforms.
Maintained Git workflows, reviewed code, and worked within Agile teams to ensure quick features shipment.
